requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal studio with warm beige cyclorama and matte. Use adult woman with poised editorial presence as the only moving person or hand. A simple matte black. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A locked-off, medium-wide shot in a warm beige studio shows a simple matte black garment rack centered on a matte floor. Hanging from a plain light-wood hanger is a long oatmeal beige trench coat (the real Burberry Foxfield trench), its clean lapels and belt visible, softly lit so the silk‑cotton faille looks smooth and refined. After a brief beat, an adult woman wearing a black turtleneck and black tailored trousers steps in from frame right. She calmly lifts the trench from the hanger, brings it slightly closer to her, and slips her arms into the sleeves in one smooth motion without fussing with buttons. She settles the collar with a light touch, then takes a small in-place quarter turn toward her left, presenting the front. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: A single, continuous try-on shows the coat’s drape and silhouette credibly without cuts. The viewer witnesses the fabric fall and clean lines as the model slips it on—simple, believable proof for a fashion piece.

candidate_categories.reason: One-take wear-and-show makes the drape and silhouette visible, matching the product’s core benefits.
candidate_categories.risk: Fine tailoring details (buttons/epaulettes) are small; we avoid close-ups and rely on overall silhouette and fabric fall.

candidate_categories.reason: Slow, static inspection could showcase texture and seams with minimal motion.
candidate_categories.risk: May feel too static and less persuasive without seeing the coat on-body.

candidate_categories.reason: Elevated studio aesthetics can reinforce luxury perception.
candidate_categories.risk: A purely premium mood may lack a concrete on-body proof moment.

creative_design.selling_angle: A long, refined oatmeal trench that instantly polishes a simple black outfit with silk‑cotton faille drape.
creative_design.visual_grammar: Locked-off medium-wide studio shot; coat hangs on rack; model enters, lifts, slips on, slight quarter turn; minimal, elegant motion.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: On-body try-on in one take to visibly demonstrate the long, refined silhouette and smooth silk‑cotton drape.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: The trench hangs centered on a minimalist rack under soft warm light, its oatmeal tone and clean lines immediately clear.
creative_design.action_arc: From the static hanging coat, an adult model steps in, lifts the coat, slips it on smoothly, settles the collar with one hand, and turns slightly to show front and side lines.
creative_design.payoff: Model holds a composed stance facing camera at a slight angle—the long, clean silhouette and refined finish clearly visible.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Avoid tiny actions like buttoning or tight belt tying. Keep camera static and movements slow to prevent fabric flutter dependence. No close-ups of small logos or hardware. Use a simple rack and hanger as the only props; consistent beige studio lighting to hint at gentle sheen without relying on subtle specular cues.

metadata.audio_direction: Soft, elegant piano underscore; natural cloth rustle as the coat is lifted and settled; no voiceover.
metadata.visual_prompt: A locked-off, medium-wide shot in a warm beige studio shows a simple matte black garment rack centered on a matte floor. Hanging from a plain light-wood hanger is a long oatmeal beige trench coat (the real Burberry Foxfield trench), its clean lapels and belt visible, softly lit so the silk‑cotton faille looks smooth and refined. After a brief beat, an adult woman wearing a black turtleneck and black tailored trousers steps in from frame right. She calmly lifts the trench from the hanger, brings it slightly closer to her, and slips her arms into the sleeves in one smooth motion without fussing with buttons. She settles the collar with a light touch, then takes a small in-place quarter turn toward her left, presenting the front and side so the long, refined silhouette is clear against the black base outfit. She holds a composed pose for a moment, letting the drape read cleanly under the soft warm light, with the empty rack remaining behind her. The camera never moves, and the action stays slow and elegant.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A locked-off, medium-wide shot in a warm beige studio shows a simple matte black garment rack centered on a matte floor. Hanging from a plain light-wood hanger is a long oatmeal beige trench coat (the real Burberry Foxfield trench), its clean lapels and belt visible.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Shoppers can’t tell if a premium trench truly has elegant drape, refined silhouette, and polished tailoring from static images alone.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=demo_proof; hook=The trench hangs centered on a minimalist rack under soft warm light, its oatmeal tone and clean lines immediately clear.; proof=On-body try-on in one take to visibly demonstrate the long, refined silhouette and smooth silk‑cotton drape.; payoff=Model holds a composed stance facing.

Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: Adult woman with poised editorial presence and neutral expression.; Slim black turtleneck and straight black tailored trousers, black low-heeled ankle boots.; Minimal.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
